title: Amahai Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Amahai with a Z-Score of +3.40. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Amahai has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The temperature is unusually high, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) of 10.9 GG, indicating a significant need for cooling. 
 The humidity is at 79% and the wind speed is 1.5 km/h, making the heat feel even more oppressive.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
